item.title: Just restored this 1934 Crosley grandfather clock radio
item.description:
This was donated to our museum recently. It is a early 30s Crosley grandfather clock radio. It's made out of a interesting material. Steamed pressed plywood to get the appearance of carved wood even though it's just crappy plywood veneer.
Is it just me or is this the dial sort of look Edward Gorey/edward scissorhands?
I polished the original electrolytic capacitor containers which are in the copper cans
Little spring pulled ribbon with pulleys adjusts the station indicator behind a lamp. The chassis was overhauled. All new capacitors, and lots of new wiring
This is a manual start synchronous motor. Meaning when you lose power it intentionally stops you'll know that your clock is incorrect.
The thin plywood had started to pull away from parts of the frame. So I reglued and clamped that to stabilize
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: My 16th fav, the earth from above
item.description:
Barcelona, Spain
New York City, USA
Dubai, UAE
Paris, France
Chicago, USA
Nördlingen, Germany
Sydney, Australia
Seattle, USA
Bern, Switzerland
Giza, Egypt
Mount Reinebringen, Norway
Vatican City
Vancouver, Canada
Shanghai, China
Amsterdam, Netherlands
Bac Son Valley, Vietnam
Mexico City, Mexico
Venice, Italy
Athens, Greece
Moscow, Russia
Turin, Italy
Island in the Maldives
Cape Town, South Africa
Mogadishu, Somalia
Orange County, FL, USA
Tulip field in Spoorbuurt , Netherlands
San Francisco, USA

item.title: Memes vol 503 Boobie
item.description:
Another edition of memes my boyfriend and I have sent each other- 1 year anniversary edition
Ms. Chompy
Me :(
“They say you want to be loved from your head to your toes until you start lovin toes”
I sent him a reel with a reel of this kid and said “I want a small fat child”
This just a fast track to the last of us
He sent me this while I was wearing this color
Looney Toons ass
Big Mama tax
Scruffy, Liza Jane and Froggy tax
Nessie tax. Happy Anniversary @chriscaprisun I love you!!!

item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: 16 fav + my fav meme genre (and cat tax)
item.description:
Edit: Ok, I did an edit bc apparently my first 16th fav was created by a godawful racist. I can promise you that asshat has now been removed from my favourites folder. Instead, meet my new 16th favourite: bird whose every decision only worsened its situation. (If someone says the bird has done anything problematic, I'm gonna fucking scream)
One of my favourite meme genres is 'Big Cats Doing Small Cat Things'. Most cat owners have observed their fascination with playing and drinking water from the tap.
Doing the playful cute thing
Getting their head stuck...
... or other body parts.
Obligatory "ooooh, big stretch!"
No cat can resist a nice box.
Doing the "butt lick interruptus"
Boxes (and other fitable and sitable containers), a felidae family favourite.
Cat tax: Miss Charlotta: "There's still the white crap outside. I thought I told you to get rid of it." Me: Or you could stay inside. Miss Charlotta: "No, no no. Constant vigilance!" The first 11 years of her life, Charlie didn't like going out in winter. As soon as snow and freezing temperatures arrived, she stayed inside and didn't ask to be let out until sometime in March. But ever since 'The Boy Invasion' ( https://imgur.com/gallery/Di0vZTD ), she must check the outside. Every. Damn. Day.
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #497
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1271 (Wizardposting IX)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Summon this bread? Summon Bread II.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I don't know. Whatdoin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Reality check from older trans person
item.description: There were even laws against it that many are trying to reinstate. They will always consider you a man in a dress. I didn't include trans men here because these thugs don't care about them outside of the fact they consider them women who have been brainwashed by "gender ideology" because women are "obviously not smart enough to think for themselves /s"
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: In Ireland Sunday means a roast dinner
item.description:
Roast beef, Yorkshire pudding, cauliflower cheese, roast potatoes, stuffing, veg, gravy and of course horseradish. Oh and very buttery mash. Probably 1 to 1 ratio butter to potato in that mash. *FP Edit* Glad you all like roast as much as I do. I have added a small request at the end of this post.
Sticky toffee pudding to finish with caramelised banana ice cream. —————— I spent two years creating a video documentary series on food, craft and music from Ireland and it’s out next month. Trailer: https://youtu.be/AWjvo9-g7qQ?si=oIdGSgqkcP44-8cK Apparently you need 1000 subscribers on YouTube to even be visible to its algorithm, and I would really love for people to see this after all that work. I’m only 100 subscribers away, so any assistance would be so greatly appreciated! FP posts get hundreds of thousands of views but if even a tiny tiny percentage subscribed it would get us over the line.
item.dc:creator: LeviathanFood

item.title: It ain't much but...
item.description: I'm from Ohio but I never knew.
item.dc:creator: StevenNumber3
